description: 角色反应驱动理解，趣味性强。惊讶脸、闪光效果让重点「活」起来。
base_style_prompt: Educational manga style with expressive character reactions. Use 3-5 panel layout. Include speed lines and spark effects to emphasize key information. Characters should show surprise, realization, and thinking expressions. Speech bubbles are natural information containers. High energy, clear information hierarchy.
key_principles: 速度线和星光增强优先级
